commands.name: init

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Show what would be created without writing 
files.

options.name: --env
options.description:
Environment names (comma-separated or multiple flags). 
Default: dev,prod

options.name: --no-aliases
options.description: Stack mode: do not create aliases.yml stub.

options.name: --no-defs
options.description:
Stack mode: do not create stack-level 
secrets.yml/configs.yml stubs.

options.name: --no-global-defs
options.description:
Do not create global baseline stubs under 
stacks/all/<env>.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Root directory to initialize (default: current 
directory).

arguments.name: STACK_ID
arguments.description:
Optional stack id. If omitted, initializes the root 
scaffold.

commands.description:
Initialize project root or a specific stack 
scaffold.

commands.name: validate

options.name: --details
options.description:
Print detailed errors and warnings after the summary 
table.

options.name: --env
options.description:
Filter environments (comma-separated or multiple flags). If
omitted, auto-detect under stacks/all/.

options.name: --out
options.description:
Write a combined JSON report to this file (optional). 
Per-stack JSONs are saved under ops/reports/preflight/.

arguments.name: STACK_ID
arguments.description:
Optional stack id. If omitted, validates all stacks under 
'stacks/'.

commands.description:
Validate a stack (or all stacks) against policies and basic 
schema.

commands.name: render

options.name: --appsettings-mode
options.description:
How to consume appsettings*.json: 'env' (flatten to env 
vars) or 'config' (generate swarm config & mount). Default: 
env.

options.name: --appsettings-target
options.description:
When --appsettings-mode=config, mount target path inside 
the container (default: /app/appsettings.json).

options.name: --no-history
options.description:
Do not write a history snapshot under 
ops/state/history.

commands.description:
Render final stack.yml for one or more 
environments.

commands.name: sync

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Do not create anything; only preview and write 
nothing.

commands.description:
Sync secrets from providers into Docker Swarm and write 
secrets map.

commands.name: prune

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Do not delete anything; just show what would be 
removed.

options.name: --keep
options.description:
Keep latest N versions per key (default: 
2).

options.name: --report
options.description:
Optional YAML report output path (e.g., 
ops/reports/prune.yml).

commands.description:
Prune old secret versions based on retain 
policy.

commands.name: doctor

options.name: --map
options.description:
Optional secrets map path (defaults to 
ops/vars/secrets-map.<env>.yml).

options.name: --root
options.description:
Project root path (defaults to current working 
directory).

commands.description:
Check consistency between secrets-map and Docker 
Engine.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Do not create or delete anything; just 
preview

options.name: --keep
options.description:
Keep at most N old versions on engine (default: 
0)

options.name: --match
options.description:
Match keys in the provided JSON. Glob (*,?) or 
/regex/.

options.name: --root
options.description:
Project root path (defaults to current working 
directory)

options.name: --scope
options.description:
Rotation scope: global | stack | service (default: 
global)

options.name: --stack
options.description:
Stack id (required if scope=stack or 
scope=service)

options.name: --version-mode
options.description:
Version mode: content-sha | timestamp | serial (default: 
content-sha)

commands.name: validate
commands.description:
Validate metadata/tenants.yml and metadata/groups.yml against
built-in schema.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Do not call Infisical. Just print what would be 
uploaded.

options.name: --from
options.description: Path to appsettings JSON to upload.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Comma-separated wildcard patterns to include (overrides
provider include).

options.name: --scope
options.description:
Scope for path templating (e.g., global, 
sso).

options.name: --root
options.description:
Project root path (defaults to current 
directory)

options.name: --appsettings-mode
options.description:
Render appsettings into env vars or config file 
(default: env).

options.name: --env-mode
options.description:
Environment naming mode. 'fixed' uses a single 
environment name. 'prefix' creates NAME_{ENV}. Default: prefix

options.name: --env-name
options.description:
When env-mode=prefix, this is the prefix (e.g. 
INFRA). When env-mode=fixed, this is the fixed name (e.g. 
ProdInfra).

options.name: --out-dir
options.description:
Output directory for pipeline YAML (default: 
ops/pipelines/azdo).

options.name: --vg-mode
options.description:
Variable groups mode. 'fixed' = CSV list, 'prefix' = 
PREFIX_{ENV}. Default: prefix

options.name: --vg-value
options.description:
When vg-mode=prefix this is the prefix; when 
vg-mode=fixed this is comma-separated variable group names.

options.name: --with-registry
options.description:
Include container registry login step (default: 
false).

options.name: --write-history
options.description:
Write render history under ops/state/history 
(default: true).
